title: Naruto
author: Kishimoto Masashi
description: A young ninja seeks recognition from his peers and dreams of becoming the Hokage.

title: Attack on Titan
author: Isayama Hajime
description: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid creatures known as Titans.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Akutami Gege
description: A high school student joins a secret organization of Jujutsu Sorcerers to eliminate Curses.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Arakawa Hiromu
description: Two brothers use alchemy in their search for the Philosopher's Stone to restore their bodies.

title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
author: Gotouge Koyoharu
description: A boy becomes a demon slayer to save his sister and avenge his family.

title: Dragon Ball
author: Toriyama Akira
description: The adventures of Son Goku from his childhood through adulthood as he trains in martial arts.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Horikoshi Kohei
description: A boy born without superpowers in a world where they are common dreams of becoming a hero.

title: Death Note
author: Ohba Tsugumi
description: A high school student discovers a supernatural notebook that allows him to kill anyone.

title: Hunter x Hunter
author: Togashi Yoshihiro
description: A young boy sets out on a journey to become a Hunter and find his missing father.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Fujimoto Tatsuki
description: A young man merges with his pet chainsaw devil to become the titular Chainsaw Man.
